care_settings.name: Urgent care center
care_settings.description: Walk-in clinics for non-life-threatening illnesses and injuries that need prompt attention outside of a regular doctor visit.

care_settings.name: Virtual visit
care_settings.description: Video or phone visits with a provider for common conditions and follow-up care.

care_settings.name: Primary care clinic
care_settings.description: Office-based primary care for routine checkups, preventive care, and ongoing conditions.

care_settings.name: Emergency room
care_settings.description: Hospital emergency department for serious, life-threatening, or complex conditions.

care_settings.name: Retail clinic
care_settings.description: Clinics located in retail stores or pharmacies for minor illnesses, vaccines, and basic services.

conditions.name: Flu-like symptoms
conditions.description: Fever, chills, body aches, cough, sore throat, fatigue, and other symptoms that may suggest influenza or a similar viral illness.

conditions.name: Low back pain
conditions.description: New or ongoing pain in the lower back area, with or without leg symptoms.

conditions.name: Sore throat
conditions.description: Pain, scratchiness, or irritation of the throat that often worsens when swallowing.

conditions.name: Skin rash
conditions.description: Red, bumpy, itchy, or irritated areas of skin that may have multiple causes.

service_categories.name: Mental health & substance use
service_categories.description: Therapy, counseling, psychiatry, and substance use treatment services.

service_categories.name: Primary care
service_categories.description: Routine checkups, chronic condition management, and general health concerns.

service_categories.name: Emergency care
service_categories.description: Emergency department visits for serious or life-threatening conditions.

service_categories.name: Imaging & diagnostics
service_categories.description: X-rays, MRIs, CT scans, ultrasounds, and other diagnostic imaging services.

service_categories.name: Prescriptions
service_categories.description: Outpatient prescription medications and pharmacy benefits.

service_categories.name: Dental
service_categories.description: Preventive and restorative dental services, including cleanings and fillings.

service_categories.name: Preventive care
service_categories.description: Screenings, vaccines, and wellness visits aimed at preventing illness.

service_categories.name: Other services
service_categories.description: Services that do not fit into another specific category.

care_guide_recommendations.recommendation_text: For mild flu-like symptoms without trouble breathing or chest pain, start with a virtual visit to review symptoms, get self-care advice, and discuss whether testing or antivirals are needed.
Use an urgent care center if you have moderate flu-like symptoms, dehydration, or worsening cough but no life-threatening signs.
Schedule a primary care visit for ongoing symptoms lasting more than a week, frequent flu episodes, or to review prevention strategies such as vaccination.
Go to the emergency room for flu-like illness if you have chest pain, difficulty breathing, confusion, fainting, or lips or face turning blue.
For a mild sore throat without severe trouble swallowing or breathing, a virtual visit can help determine whether testing or antibiotics are needed.
See your primary care clinic for sore throat lasting more than a few days, recurrent episodes, or when an in-person exam or throat swab is recommended.
Use urgent care for sore throat with high fever, swollen tonsils, or if you need rapid testing outside of regular office hours.
For new or intermittent low back pain without leg weakness, bowel or bladder changes, or major trauma, start with a primary care visit to assess and create a treatment plan.
Virtual visits can be used to review low back pain history, discuss home exercises and medications, and decide if in-person evaluation is needed.
Consider urgent care for sudden severe back pain after minor injury when you cannot see your regular doctor promptly.
For most new rashes without severe pain, rapid spreading, or signs of infection, a virtual visit with photos is a convenient first step.
See a primary care clinic for rashes that persist, recur, or may require in-person testing or procedures.

medical_services.name: Outpatient therapy visit
medical_services.description: Individual outpatient therapy or counseling session with a licensed mental health professional.

medical_services.name: Primary care office visit
medical_services.description: Routine office visit with a primary care provider for new or ongoing health concerns.

medical_services.name: Emergency room visit
medical_services.description: Visit to a hospital emergency department for serious or potentially life-threatening conditions.

medical_services.name: MRI of knee without contrast
medical_services.description: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the knee joint performed without contrast dye.

medical_services.name: Generic prescription, 30-day supply
medical_services.description: Thirty-day supply of a covered generic prescription medication filled at a retail pharmacy.

medical_services.name: Annual wellness visit
medical_services.description: Yearly preventive visit focused on health screening, risk assessment, and counseling.
